game_info.title: Stellar Odyssey - A Space Adventure
game_info.concept:
Space opera is a love letter written by humans to the stars. Space opera is a love letter written by humans to the stars.

E.T.S. studio. Ciyunhe
Thank you for your play.
game_info.description: Embark on an interstellar journey as a lone starship pilot navigating through a beautiful but dangerous cosmos. Collect cosmic crystals scattered across space while avoiding asteroid fields and hostile enemy drones. Each crystal brings you closer to unlocking the mysteries of the universe. Your mission is to collect all crystals before your ship's energy depletes or you collide with space hazards. The stars are calling—will you answer?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate your starship through space (Up/Down/Left/Right)
Space: Fire energy projectiles to destroy enemy drones and asteroids
Shift: Activate temporary shield (limited energy)
Z: Boost speed (consumes energy faster)
ENTER: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: This test validates basic movement mechanics and collision detection. The AI will navigate through the play area, testing all four directional movements and ensuring the ship stays within bounds. It will also test basic interactions with collectibles and obstacles.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The AI will perform systematic movement patterns: moving in each cardinal direction, testing boundary limits, and attempting to collect nearby crystals. It will move in a grid-like pattern to cover the playable area methodically.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the ship moves smoothly in all directions, stays within canvas boundaries, collects crystals on contact, and properly detects collisions with asteroids. The game should remain stable without crashes for at least 300 frames.

TEST_2.test_description: This test implements an optimal winning strategy by efficiently collecting all cosmic crystals while avoiding hazards. The AI will prioritize crystal collection, use weapons to clear obstacles, and manage energy resources wisely.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The AI navigates to the nearest uncollected crystal using pathfinding, shoots asteroids blocking the path, and uses boost strategically to reach distant crystals quickly. It maintains safe distance from enemy drones while eliminating them with projectiles when necessary.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test succeeds when all crystals are collected within a reasonable timeframe (typically 1800-3000 frames), triggering the win condition. The AI should maintain positive energy levels and avoid game-over scenarios caused by collisions or energy depletion.

TEST_3.test_description: This test validates the combat system by engaging with enemy drones and asteroids. It tests projectile firing, hit detection, enemy AI behavior, and the scoring system for destroying hazards.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The AI will actively seek out enemy drones and asteroids, maintaining optimal firing distance while shooting projectiles. It will test rapid firing, moving while shooting, and verifying that destroyed enemies are properly removed from the game.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The test is successful if projectiles reliably hit and destroy targets, enemies are removed upon destruction, score increases appropriately, and the player ship can survive multiple combat encounters without errors.

TEST_4.test_description: This test validates the shield mechanic and energy management system. It tests shield activation, energy consumption, shield protection against collisions, and energy regeneration mechanics.
TEST_4.strategy_description: The AI will deliberately approach hazards with shield activated to test collision protection. It will cycle between shield usage and normal flight to test energy drain and regeneration rates. It will also test shield behavior at low energy levels.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The test succeeds if the shield successfully prevents damage from collisions while active, energy depletes at the correct rate during shield use, energy regenerates when shield is inactive, and the shield cannot be activated when energy is too low.
TEST_4.description: This test validates the shield mechanic and energy management system. It tests shield activation, energy consumption, shield protection against collisions, and energy regeneration mechanics.

TEST_4.expected: The test succeeds if the shield successfully prevents damage from collisions while active, energy depletes at the correct rate during shield use, energy regenerates when shield is inactive, and the shield cannot be activated when energy is too low.

TEST_5.test_description: This test validates the boost mechanic and its interaction with energy and movement. It tests speed increase during boost, energy consumption, and navigation accuracy at high speeds.
TEST_5.strategy_description: The AI will activate boost while navigating toward crystals, testing high-speed maneuvering around obstacles. It will alternate between normal and boosted movement to verify speed changes and energy drain rates.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: The test is successful if boost significantly increases movement speed, energy depletes faster during boost, the ship can still be controlled accurately at high speeds, and boost properly deactivates when energy is low.
TEST_5.description: This test validates the boost mechanic and its interaction with energy and movement. It tests speed increase during boost, energy consumption, and navigation accuracy at high speeds.
TEST_5.strategy: The AI will activate boost while navigating toward crystals, testing high-speed maneuvering around obstacles. It will alternate between normal and boosted movement to verify speed changes and energy drain rates.
TEST_5.expected: The test is successful if boost significantly increases movement speed, energy depletes faster during boost, the ship can still be controlled accurately at high speeds, and boost properly deactivates when energy is low.

TEST_6.test_description: This test validates game state transitions and UI elements. It tests pause/unpause functionality, game over conditions (both win and lose), restart mechanics, and proper state handling.
TEST_6.strategy_description: The AI will trigger various game states: pausing mid-game, letting energy deplete to trigger game over, collecting all crystals to trigger win state, and using restart to return to the start screen. It verifies proper state transitions.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: The test succeeds if all game phases transition correctly, pause freezes gameplay but not UI, game over screens display properly with correct messages, and restart returns to a fresh game state without carrying over previous data.
TEST_6.description: This test validates game state transitions and UI elements. It tests pause/unpause functionality, game over conditions (both win and lose), restart mechanics, and proper state handling.

TEST_7.test_description: This test validates edge cases and stress scenarios. It tests simultaneous collisions, rapid input changes, maximum entity counts, and boundary collision handling to ensure game stability under extreme conditions.
TEST_7.strategy_description: The AI will perform rapid, erratic movements including quick direction changes, simultaneous button presses, and intentionally triggering multiple collisions at once. It will test the limits of the game's collision and physics systems.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: The test is successful if the game maintains stability without crashes or visual glitches, collision detection remains accurate during rapid movements, entities are properly cleaned up when destroyed, and frame rate remains stable under stress.
TEST_7.description: This test validates edge cases and stress scenarios. It tests simultaneous collisions, rapid input changes, maximum entity counts, and boundary collision handling to ensure game stability under extreme conditions.
TEST_7.strategy: The AI will perform rapid, erratic movements including quick direction changes, simultaneous button presses, and intentionally triggering multiple collisions at once. It will test the limits of the game's collision and physics systems.
TEST_7.expected: The test is successful if the game maintains stability without crashes or visual glitches, collision detection remains accurate during rapid movements, entities are properly cleaned up when destroyed, and frame rate remains stable under stress.
